tools.applyShapingDesc: Auto-fill no-stitch cells based on increases/decreases

tips.colorsStitchesDesc: 78 yarn colors across 13 palettes including seasonal sets (Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter). 40+ stitches in 8 categories: Basic, Slip, Texture, Decrease, Increase, Cable, Colorwork, and Brioche.
tips.drawingToolsDesc: Use Paint (B), Fill (F), Eraser (E), or Select (S) mode from the toolbar or keyboard shortcuts. Toggle horizontal/vertical mirroring for symmetric designs.
tips.patternRepeatDesc: Select a rectangular region with the Select tool, then press T or click the Tile button to repeat the motif across the entire grid.
tips.saveExportDesc: Name your pattern, then save to browser storage or export as a .json file. Export charts as PNG images or PDF with legend and notes.
tips.patternNotesDesc: Record yarn weight, needle size, gauge, and other project details. Notes are included in saved patterns and PDF exports.
tips.stitchCountDesc: Rows with increases or decreases show a live +/− indicator next to the row number. Hover for details on active stitch count and net change.
tips.applyShapingDesc: Automatically adjusts rows based on increases and decreases. Adds no-stitch padding at edges and fills missing stitches with knit. Expands the grid width if needed.
tips.darkModeDesc: Toggle light/dark theme with the sun/moon button in the toolbar.

shortcuts.click: Paint a cell with current stitch & color

toasts.shapingAppliedDesc: Rows adjusted with centered no-stitch placeholders.

validation.rowMismatch: Row has {{actual}} active sts, expected {{expected}} (based on previous row + shaping)
